title: Mystical Create
description: A Create Focus Modpack with Mystical Agriculture. The main objective is make all itens!
body:
![The Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d8889db1eea3edc868b644d3886122727490955e.png) ## Short Description The idea is that the player, use CREATE mods for all constructions and automation, and MYSTICAL AGRICULTURE to get all items in the game. In the end it's having a big fully automated farm that will provide all the items you need, almost a creative mode! This modpack is in DEVELOPMENT! So I really want to know the thoughts of players to build a really nice modpack for everyone to enjoy! ## How to install: ### Modrinth Download the modrinth app ([https://modrinth.com/app](https://modrinth.com/app)), search for the modpack, install and PLAY!

 

(Manual instalation I don't know how to help yet!)

*** ### Features: Here is a summary of the features of this modpack! - Create Mod - Create now gerenates FE with Alternator - Immersive Engineering to make good use of energy generate by the Create - Have solutions for storage as Applied Energitics 2 - Magic crops? Mystical Agriculture can help you get a lot of materials without go out for them! - Much More on the pack!
